subtitle: Party Games
description: Gather your crew. May the best player win.

nativeAd.title: Reserved ad space
nativeAd.description: This card simulates the native ad that will sit between games while the real integration is prepared.

tutorial.title: How to play {{name}}
tutorial.stepOne: Open the game and set up the match with your group.
tutorial.stepTwo: Follow the on-screen instructions during each turn or round.
tutorial.stepThree: Check the result at the end and start another match whenever you want.

top-10.name: Top 10
top-10.shortDescription: Guess ranked lists and score more for the top positions.

nem-ferrando.name: No Way
nem-ferrando.shortDescription: Numerical trivia, wild guesses, and plenty of penalties for answers that miss by a mile.

impostor-da-palavra.name: Word Impostor
impostor-da-palavra.shortDescription: Find out who is pretending to know the word.

quem-sou-eu.name: Who Am I
quem-sou-eu.shortDescription: Write up to 5 words, put the phone on your forehead, and try to guess.

cidade-dorme.name: Sleeping Town
cidade-dorme.shortDescription: Secret roles, bluffs, and a town in danger.

adedonha.name: Categories
adedonha.shortDescription: Create topics, share by QR, and fill answers on each phone.

mimica.name: Charades
mimica.shortDescription: Get your friends to guess without saying a word.

taboo.name: Forbidden Clue
taboo.shortDescription: Describe the word without using the forbidden clues.

jogo-da-velha.name: Tic-Tac-Toe
jogo-da-velha.shortDescription: Get three symbols in a row to win.

damas.name: Checkers
damas.shortDescription: Capture the pieces and rule the board.

ludo.name: Ludo
ludo.shortDescription: Bring all your pieces to the finish.
